_documentation.overview: This is a template for creating custom extraction configs. Copy this file and rename it to match your source (e.g., 'my-newsletter.json').
_documentation.usage: Reference this config in sources.json by setting 'config': 'my-newsletter' (without .json extension)

fields.name: Human-readable name for this config
fields.description: What this config extracts and why
fields.include_patterns: Only items matching at least one pattern are included. Leave empty to include all.
fields.exclude_patterns: Items matching any pattern are excluded, even if they match include_patterns.
fields.include_sections: If specified, only extract from these sections.
fields.allowed_domains: Whitelist - only links to these domains are extracted. Empty = allow all.
fields.blocked_domains: Blacklist - links to these domains are never extracted.
fields.require_include_pattern: If true, items MUST match an include_pattern. If false, items only need to NOT match exclude_patterns.
fields.require_url: If true, items must have a URL to be included.
fields.extract_markets_section: For newsletter configs - extract bullet points from Markets-style sections.
fields.csv_columns: Column headers for CSV/Sheets export. Order determines column order. Use 'include_headers: false' in scheduler for append-only mode.
fields.capabilities: Object defining advanced features. Enable only what your workflow needs.

capabilities_reference.csv_export: Enable CSV export with custom columns. Useful for data pipelines and spreadsheet workflows.
capabilities_reference.grid_enrichment: Enable Grid/database enrichment features. Requires external Grid API setup.
capabilities_reference.research_articles: Enable deep article fetching and research-grade summarization.
capabilities_reference.custom_prompts: Enable custom AI prompts for specialized extraction logic.

name: My Custom Config
description: Custom extraction config for [Your Source]. Extracts [topics] while filtering out [noise].
notes: Add any notes about this extraction config here. Document why certain patterns are included/excluded.
